description: One full pastel illustration of the narrated moment, held under the narration. No structure or reveal.
whenToUse: When a beat just needs one image held (an establishing shot, a mood beat, a single iconic moment) with no on-screen text or timed elements.
generalize: The subject/scene and the field are SLOTS. Optional slow motion (Ken-Burns) can be added later; default is a static hold.
produces: one gpt-image-2 illustration of the scene as bgUrl; SceneComposite holds it with the vibrance pass.

scene.note: SHORT plain description of the full illustration; no style words

styleLock: STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE prepended to the scene; no text.
rules: One idea per frame; fill the screen; nothing critical in the lower ~12%.
Field chosen from palette, rotate vs prevField.
Vibrance pass applied so output isn't washed-out.
